Petition To Set Aside Order Approving First And Final Account And Final Decree Of Distribution And For Instruction And Distribution On Mineral, Leasehold And Royalty Interest
Off Calendar Nov-19-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ed Watson and Tom Reed for Larry Lanctot. William Ricely for petitioner.

The Court denied the petition stating that it was not timely. Mr. Reed is to prepare the order.
